_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: ComitasBotJ
author: comitas@thehsi.cloud
description: A Plugin Based Discord Bot. For those Server with 10 Bots all doing only one thing.

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
# ComitasBot Installation Script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server

USER_AGENT="Pterodactyl (https://Pterodactyl.io)"
GITHUB_REPO="TheHSI-HQ/ComitasBotJ"

if [ -n "${DL_PATH}" ]; then
    echo "Using supplied download url: ${DL_PATH}"

    TEMPLATE=$(printf '%s' "$DL_PATH" | sed -e 's/{{/${/g' -e 's/}}/}/g')

    DOWNLOAD_URL=$(eval "printf '%s' \"$TEMPLATE\"")

else
    if [ "${COMITAS_VERSION}" = "latest" ] || [ -z "${COMITAS_VERSION}" ]; then
        echo -e "Fetching latest release..."

        COMITAS_VERSION=$(curl --user-agent "${USER_AGENT}" \
            -s "https://api.github.com/repos/${GITHUB_REPO}/releases/latest" \
            | jq -r '.tag_name')

        if [ -z "${COMITAS_VERSION}" ] || [ "${COMITAS_VERSION}" = "null" ]; then
            echo "Failed to determine latest release."
            exit 1
        fi
    else
        echo -e "Using specified version: ${COMITAS_VERSION}"

        VERSION_EXISTS=$(curl --user-agent "${USER_AGENT}" \
            -s "https://api.github.com/repos/${GITHUB_REPO}/releases/tags/${COMITAS_VERSION}" \
            | jq -r '.tag_name')

        if [ "${VERSION_EXISTS}" != "${COMITAS_VERSION}" ]; then
            echo "Version ${COMITAS_VERSION} does not exist."
            exit 1
        fi
    fi

    echo -e "Version being downloaded"
    echo -e "Version: ${COMITAS_VERSION}"

    DOWNLOAD_URL="https://github.com/${GITHUB_REPO}/releases/download/${COMITAS_VERSION}/comitas-core-${COMITAS_VERSION#v}.jar"
fi

cd /mnt/server

echo -e "Running curl --user-agent \"${USER_AGENT}\" -L -o ${SERVER_JARFILE} ${DOWNLOAD_URL}"

if [ -f "${SERVER_JARFILE}" ]; then
    mv "${SERVER_JARFILE}" "${SERVER_JARFILE}.old"
fi

curl --user-agent "${USER_AGENT}" -L -o "${SERVER_JARFILE}" "${DOWNLOAD_URL}"

if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
    echo "Download failed."
    exit 1
fi

echo "Download complete."

variables.name: ComitasBotJ Version
variables.description:
The version of ComitasBotJ to download. 

Leave at latest to always get the latest version. Invalid versions will default to latest.

variables.name: Server Jar File
variables.description: The name of the server jarfile to run the server with.

variables.name: Download Path
variables.description: A URL to use to download a server.jar rather than the ones in the install script. This is not user viewable.
